message:
chore: add .rchignore to exclude transient remote compilation helper scratch dirs

Tells rch (remote compilation helper) to ignore .rch-*/ and .rch_target*/
directories during rsync operations. These directories are agent-local
scratch spaces that can appear and vanish mid-build and should never be
synced to remote workers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+# Agent-local RCH scratch directories are transient and can vanish mid-rsync.
+.rch-*/
+.rch_target*/
